title: Emotion Discovery and Reasoning its Flip
description: Emotion discovery and flip reasoning task requiring annotators to identify the current emotion in a dialogue turn, and locate trigger spans and flip points where emotions change. Based on SemEval-2024 Task 10.
citation:

    year = "2024",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics"
}
